zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk Paganell於1050年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye25歲，母親Lesceline de Fontenay26歲。他和Beatrice fitz Ausculph至少有1個兒子。他去世於1130年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: Paganell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dino, Angelo, Caesar, Elvio, Marino, Vincenzo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Paganello, a pet form of the personal name Pagano .

variants.name: Pagano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Antonio, Sal, Canio, Domenic, Filippo, Giovanni, Matteo, Rocco, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Pagano, from Latin Paganus, from a word meaning ‘village, rustic’ (see Pagan , Payne ).

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk Paganell was born in 1050, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, was 25 and his mother, Lesceline de Fontenay, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Beatrice fitz Ausculph. He died in 1130, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Beatrice fitz Ausculph. Il est décédé en 1130, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk Paganell 1050 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye 25 und seine Mutter Lesceline de Fontenay 26. Er hatte mit Beatrice fitz Ausculph mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk Paganellが1050年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambyeは25歳，母Lesceline de Fontenayは26歳であった。彼はBeatrice fitz Ausculphとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1130年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーダドリー カストルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Fulk Paganell(이)가 1050년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lesceline de Fontenay(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Beatrice fitz Ausculph(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리에 묻혔다.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, , England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk Paganell родился в 1050 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lesceline de Fontenay, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Beatrice fitz Ausculph. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
